page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-8x.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance integrates eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn7i-8x.32xlarge represents a high-density hardware profile designed for parallel processing workloads. The combination of dedicated physical CPU cores and multiple enterprise-grade GPUs makes this instance suitable for deep learning training, large-scale AI inference, 3D rendering, and parallel scientific computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-8x.32xlarge is an x86_64 server instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance integrates eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs with a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. It lacks local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This high-density resource profile is designed for parallel processing workloads, making it suitable for deep learning, AI inference, 3D rendering, and complex scientific simulations.

tagline: An accelerator-focused instance featuring eight dedicated GPUs and 128 physical processor cores for highly parallelized computational workloads.
